rationale: Stage 4 vti-plan blocks because two file classes added during the gate-completion phase (PRD-*.md project copy required by ac-traceability; extended-gates.toml required by semver-check) are not routed by any lane in agent/proof-lanes.toml. The scaffold template did not anticipate these because they are gate-side configuration, not source. Proposing a 'docs-and-config' lane that resolves them to a 'docs-only' command (file-existence check) — they do not affect runtime behavior or the unfakeable metric.

lane.description: Project-level docs (PRD copy) and gate-side config (extended-gates.toml). No behavioral impact; routed to a presence check.

ac_impact: none — ACs 1..8 unchanged; no MUST behavior depends on these files
